title: Design System: Ngô Gia Hạo Portfolio

display.purpose: Hero name only. One instance per page.

headline.purpose: Section headings: Dự Án, Về Tôi, Liên Hệ.

title.purpose: Project card titles, detail page subheadings.

body.purpose: Paragraph text. Max 72ch on detail pages, 52ch in hero.

label.purpose: Section markers, meta labels. Always mono, uppercase, with preceding cyan line.

shadows.name: card-hover-glow
shadows.purpose: Faint cyan ambient glow behind project cards on hover.

shadows.name: button-hover-glow
shadows.purpose: Stronger cyan glow behind primary CTA on hover.

shadows.name: lightbox-drop
shadows.purpose: Deep shadow behind lightbox images over dark overlay.

motion.name: t-fast
motion.purpose: Button hover, link hover, badge hover. Quick state changes.

motion.name: t-base
motion.purpose: Card hover, card media scale. Slightly deliberate transitions.

motion.name: fade-up
motion.purpose: Scroll-in animation for sections. translateY(24px) to 0.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: Main CTA button. Cyan pill shape, dark text. Used for 'Xem Chi Tiết' and 'Xem Dự Án'.
components.html: <button class="ds-btn-primary">Xem Chi Tiết <svg width="14" height="14" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2.2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"><line x1="5" y1="12" x2="19" y2="12"/><polyline points="12 5 19 12 12 19"/></svg></button>
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 0.5rem; padding: 0.625rem 1.375rem; border-radius: 9999px; font-family: 'Space Grotesk', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 600; cursor: pointer; border: 1px solid transparent; background: #00e5ff; color: #09090b; transition: box-shadow 150ms ease; white-space: nowrap; text-decoration: none; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { box-shadow: 0 0 20px rgba(0, 229, 255, 0.38); } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #00e5ff; outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Outline Button
components.description: Secondary action button with border. Used for GitHub links and 'Liên hệ'.
components.css: .ds-btn-outline { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 0.5rem; padding: 0.625rem 1.375rem; border-radius: 9999px; font-family: 'Space Grotesk', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 600; cursor: pointer; border: 1px solid #27272a; background: transparent; color: #fafafa; transition: background 150ms ease, border-color 150ms ease; white-space: nowrap; text-decoration: none; } .ds-btn-outline:hover { background: #1c1c21; border-color: #7d8088; } .ds-btn-outline:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #00e5ff; outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Ghost Button
components.description: Tertiary action with no background or border. Used for standalone icon+text links.
components.css: .ds-btn-ghost { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 0.5rem; padding: 0.625rem 0.5rem; border-radius: 9999px; font-family: 'Space Grotesk', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 600; cursor: pointer; border: 1px solid transparent; background: transparent; color: #b8bcc7; transition: color 150ms ease; white-space: nowrap; text-decoration: none; } .ds-btn-ghost:hover { color: #fafafa; } .ds-btn-ghost:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #00e5ff; outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Badge
components.description: Tech stack tag with icon. Used on project cards and about section.
components.html: NestJS
components.css: .ds-badge { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 0.375rem; padding: 0.3rem 0.65rem; background: #131316; border: 1px solid #27272a; border-radius: 6px; font-family: 'Space Grotesk', monospace; font-size: 0.75rem; font-weight: 500; color: #b8bcc7; letter-spacing: 0.03em; transition: border-color 150ms ease, background 150ms ease; } .ds-badge:hover { border-color: #3f3f46; }

components.name: Section Label
components.description: The system's signature element. Uppercase mono label preceded by a 24px cyan line. Used before every section heading.
components.css: .ds-section-label { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 0.5rem; font-family: 'Space Grotesk', monospace; font-size: 0.7rem; font-weight: 500; letter-spacing: 0.15em; text-transform: uppercase; color: #00e5ff; margin-bottom: 1rem; } .ds-section-label::before { content: ''; display: block; width: 24px; height: 1px; background: #00e5ff; }

components.name: Contact Link
components.description: Contact action with icon. Used in the contact section for email, GitHub, LinkedIn.
components.html: ngogiahao@email.com
components.css: .ds-contact-link { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 0.625rem; padding: 0.75rem 1.25rem; background: #131316; border: 1px solid #27272a; border-radius: 10px; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 500; color: #b8bcc7; text-decoration: none; transition: color 150ms ease, border-color 150ms ease, background 150ms ease; } .ds-contact-link:hover { color: #fafafa; border-color: #00e5ff; background: rgba(0, 229, 255, 0.1); } .ds-contact-link:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #00e5ff; outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Navigation
components.description: Sticky top nav with blurred background, logo in Signal Cyan, text links in Cool Silver.
components.html:
NGÔ GIA HẠO
ProjectsAboutContact
components.css: .ds-nav { position: sticky; top: 0; z-index: 50; border-bottom: 1px solid #27272a; background: rgba(9, 9, 11, 0.8); backdrop-filter: blur(16px); -webkit-backdrop-filter: blur(16px); } .ds-nav-inner { display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between; padding: 1rem 2rem; max-width: 1200px; margin: 0 auto; } .ds-nav-logo { font-family: 'Space Grotesk', system-ui, sans-serif; font-weight: 700; font-size: 1rem; letter-spacing: 0.05em; color: #00e5ff; text-transform: uppercase; } .ds-nav-links { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 2rem; } .ds-nav-link { font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 500; color: #b8bcc7; text-decoration: none; transition: color 150ms ease; } .ds-nav-link:hover { color: #fafafa; }

narrative.overview:
A dim control room where one cyan signal cuts through the dark. Every element earns its brightness; nothing glows without purpose. The portfolio is a quiet, structured space where project work speaks through clean composition and precise spacing, not through decoration or spectacle.

The system rejects both template blandness and over-designed portfolios. No parallax hero sections, no gradient text, no glassmorphism cards, no bouncing animations. Equally, no flat white pages with Times New Roman that look abandoned. The Signal Room sits between those extremes: dark, focused, technically confident, with just enough visual craft to signal that the person behind it cares about details.
keyCharacteristics: Dark tonal layering with no pure black or pure white
Cyan accent used on less than 15% of any screen
Monospaced labels and section markers for a technical register
Geometric sans-serif headings (Space Grotesk) for structured clarity
Humanist body text (Inter) for comfortable reading at paragraph length
Flat surfaces with border containment; shadows appear only on hover as ambient glow

rules.name: The Signal Ratio Rule
rules.body: Signal Cyan occupies no more than 15% of any screen's visual area. It marks section labels, primary CTAs, and interactive states. If a screen looks 'cyan', something is wrong.

rules.name: The Atmospheric-Only Rule
rules.body: Violet Accent exists only in radial gradient washes in the hero. It never appears as solid color on any element. If violet is readable, it's a violation.

rules.name: The Label Anatomy Rule
rules.body: Every label is: mono font, 0.7rem, weight 500, uppercase, 0.12em tracking, Signal Cyan color, with a 24px horizontal line before it. No exceptions.

rules.name: The Flat-At-Rest Rule
rules.body: No surface casts a shadow at rest. Glow appears only as a hover response. If a card has a shadow without being hovered, it's wrong.

dos: Do use Signal Cyan exclusively for interactive elements, labels, and small indicators.
Do maintain the Label Anatomy exactly: mono, uppercase, 0.7rem, 0.12em tracking, preceded by a 24px cyan line.
Do keep body text at Cool Silver (#b8bcc7), never at Near White. Near White is for headings only.
Do use pill-shaped buttons (border-radius: 9999px) for all button variants.
Do use tonal layering (Void to Panel to Hover) instead of shadows for depth at rest.
Do keep line height at 1.7 for body text. Vietnamese diacritics need the vertical breathing room.
Do use clamp() for responsive typography.
Do respect the 72ch max line length on detail pages.
donts: Don't use template portfolio patterns: identical card grids with icon + heading + text repeated endlessly.
Don't add gratuitous animations, parallax scrolling, gradient text, 3D transforms, or glassmorphism.
Don't use Violet Accent as a solid color on any element.
Don't use pure black (#000) or pure white (#fff).
Don't use border-left or border-right greater than 1px as a colored accent stripe.
Don't use bounce or elastic easing.
Don't put shadows on surfaces at rest.
Don't use 'thanh thao', 'hoan thien', 'thanh cong' in copy.
